revision.comment: templates do not belong in content categories & recommended to place them in template categories per [[WP:CAT#T]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = World Heritage Sites in Japan |title = [[List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites in Japan]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image = [[Image:Flag of Japan.svg|right|border|50px|Flag of Japan]]
| group1 = [[Hokkaido]] | list1 = * [[Shiretoko National Park|Shiretoko]] * [[Jōmon Prehistoric Sites in Northern Japan|Jōmon Prehistoric Sites]]
| group2 = [[Tōhoku region|Tōhoku]] | list2 = * [[Historic Monuments and Sites of Hiraizumi|Hiraizumi – Temples, Gardens and Archaeological Sites Representing the Buddhist Pure Land]] * [[Shirakami-Sanchi]] * [[Sites of Japan's Meiji Industrial Revolution: Iron and Steel, Shipbuilding and Coal Mining|Sites of Japan's Meiji Industrial Revolution: {{small|Iron and Steel, Shipbuilding and Coal Mining}}]] * [[Jōmon Prehistoric Sites in Northern Japan|Jōmon Prehistoric Sites]]
| group3 = [[Kantō region|Kantō]] | list3 = * [[The Architectural Work of Le Corbusier]] * [[Shrines and Temples of Nikkō]] * [[Bonin Islands|Ogasawara Islands]] * [[Tomioka Silk Mill]]
| group4 = [[Chūbu region|Chūbu]] | list4 = * [[Historic Villages of Shirakawa-gō and Gokayama]] * [[Mount Fuji|Fujisan, sacred place and source of artistic inspiration]] * [[Sites of Japan's Meiji Industrial Revolution: Iron and Steel, Shipbuilding and Coal Mining|Sites of Japan's Meiji Industrial Revolution: {{small|Iron and Steel, Shipbuilding and Coal Mining}}]]
| group5 = [[Kansai region|Kansai]] | list5 = * [[Buddhist Monuments in the Hōryū-ji Area]] * [[Himeji Castle]] * [[Historic Monuments of Ancient Kyoto (Kyoto, Uji and Otsu Cities)|Historic Monuments of Ancient Kyoto]] * [[Historic Monuments of Ancient Nara]] * [[Mozu Tombs|Mozu]]-[[Furuichi Kofun Cluster|Furuichi]] [[Kofun]] Group * [[Sacred Sites and Pilgrimage Routes in the Kii Mountain Range]]
| group6 = [[Chūgoku region|Chūgoku]] | list6 = * [[Hiroshima Peace Memorial]] <small>(Genbaku Dome)</small> * [[Itsukushima Shrine|Itsukushima Shinto Shrine]] * [[Iwami Ginzan Silver Mine|Iwami Ginzan Silver Mine and its Cultural Landscape]] * [[Sites of Japan's Meiji Industrial Revolution: Iron and Steel, Shipbuilding and Coal Mining|Sites of Japan's Meiji Industrial Revolution: {{small|Iron and Steel, Shipbuilding and Coal Mining}}]]
| group7 = [[Kyushu]] | list7 = * [[Gusuku Sites and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu]] * [[Sacred Island of Okinoshima and Associated Sites in the Munakata Region]] * [[Sites of Japan's Meiji Industrial Revolution: Iron and Steel, Shipbuilding and Coal Mining|Sites of Japan's Meiji Industrial Revolution: {{small|Iron and Steel, Shipbuilding and Coal Mining}}]] * [[Yakushima]] * [[Hidden Christian Sites in the Nagasaki Region]] * [[Amami-Ōshima Island, Tokunoshima Island, northern part of Okinawa Island, and Iriomote Island]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Asia World Heritage Site templates|Japan]] </noinclude>
